sections.paragraph:
verb לחקות

to imitate, copy, mimic, emulate

verb לחקות

to follow; draw

verb חוקה

be imitated, copied, emulated

verb חוקה

verb לחקות (>>חיקה)

to imitate, copy, mimic, emulate
